description: Fixture mimicking `vercel env ls preview --format json` and `vercel env ls production --format json` outputs. Used by boot-gates.sh Gate 11 to validate deploy-and-verify.sh's parsing logic without needing a live Vercel project.

preview_only_all_branches_scope.description: All required env vars present on Preview, scoped to all preview branches (target=['preview'], no gitBranch).

preview_branch_scoped_trap.description: Env vars exist on Preview but only for a single branch — the Run #4 failure mode. deploy-and-verify.sh must HALT.

preview_missing_vars.description: Production has vars that Preview doesn't. deploy-and-verify.sh must HALT.
